segments.original_text: Teaも結構いったるでみたいな

segments.text: If they could get that dodge, it was about whether they could recover, but...

full_text: Tea's also pushing it hard, looks like I'm getting that vibe But with Sonic though... If they could get that dodge, it was about whether they could recover, but...
